auditx_detectors.purpose: Detect live module graph drift from the Xi-6 frozen architecture graph without an explicit update tag.
Detect module boundary violations against module_boundary_rules.v1.
Detect duplicate semantic engines against the Xi-6 single-engine registry.
Reinforce the constitutional renderer and UI truth-leak boundary.
Detect missing or incomplete Xi-7/Xi-8 CI guardrail surfaces and workflow wiring.
Detect Xi-8 repository-structure drift, unsanctioned source pockets, and unknown top-level roots.
Run the deterministic numeric discipline scan as part of the Xi-8 audit surface.

description: Deterministic Xi-8 CI gate catalog for RepoX, AuditX, TestX, structure-lock enforcement, and validation/Omega execution.

provisional_allowances.reason: Xi-6, Xi-7, and Xi-8 freeze and guard artifacts live under data/architecture as non-runtime support surfaces.
provisional_allowances.replacement_plan: Classify data/architecture explicitly in the next architecture-update revision instead of relying on a provisional allowance.

provisional_allowances.reason: ControlX planning helpers still reuse review-side analysis helpers during the Xi-7/Xi-8 integration phase.
provisional_allowances.replacement_plan: Move the shared logic into a neutral support surface or refresh module boundaries via ARCH-GRAPH-UPDATE before tightening this allowance away.

provisional_allowances.reason: AuditX Xi-7/Xi-8 analyzers reuse CI helper logic to report missing or drifted guard surfaces deterministically.
provisional_allowances.replacement_plan: Move shared CI-drift analysis into a neutral support surface or refresh module boundaries via ARCH-GRAPH-UPDATE before tightening this allowance away.

provisional_allowances.reason: RepoX reuses Xi-7/Xi-8 CI helper logic to keep hard-fail rules aligned with CI metadata.
provisional_allowances.replacement_plan: Move shared CI-drift analysis into a neutral support surface or refresh module boundaries via ARCH-GRAPH-UPDATE before tightening this allowance away.

provisional_allowances.reason: Xi-7/Xi-8 TestX smoke tests inspect the committed CI profile metadata to keep enforcement deterministic.
provisional_allowances.replacement_plan: Move shared CI profile assertions into a neutral test support surface or refresh module boundaries via ARCH-GRAPH-UPDATE before tightening this allowance away.

repox_rules.purpose: Block reintroduction of generic src roots.
Require the Xi-6 frozen architecture graph and drift guard.
Require the Xi-8 repository structure lock and sanctioned source-pocket exceptions.
Require live repository roots to stay registered in the Xi-6/Xi-8 frozen architecture surfaces.
Require the Xi-7/Xi-8 CI guardrail surface and workflow wiring.
Require the STRICT profile as the declared merge guard for main.
